label: web_search (public)
info:
PUBLIC web_search flow-tool — the drop-in replacement for Tools/tool-web-search.

Contract (matches tool-web-search): input {query:string (required), count?:integer 1..20} (max_results accepted as an alias); output {results:[{title,url,snippet,rank}]}.

Provider is selected from the platform runtime's OWN env (nodered-platform-secrets): SEARCH_PROVIDER=serpapi|brave + SERPAPI_API_KEY / BRAVE_SEARCH_API_KEY. With no provider key configured it returns DETERMINISTIC keyless MOCK results, exactly like tool-web-search's keyless fixtures.

Shape: http in (POST /web_search) -> prepare -> switch(provider|mock) -> [build request -> http request -> normalize] | [mock] -> http response.

nodes.name: prepare args + pick provider
build provider request
normalize -> {results}
keyless mock results
